metadata.authority: Guide instance 1; pending Guide instance 2 for Stage 1 instructions

entry.action: DO NOT POP — predates platform-separation work

fleet.action: DO NOT RESUME — pause spans the entire platform-separation effort

vikunja_server.stage1_action: Stage 1.4 F4 fix requires temporary restart, then stop again

scheduled_tasks.note: 12 disabled via non-elevated Disable-ScheduledTask; 1 (Agents Cadence Monitor, LogonType=S4U) required elevated PowerShell Disable-ScheduledTask run by the Lead Architect — see Anomaly A3 for the Stage 4.7 implication

artifact.contents: stage state, recovery anchors, execution log, anomalies

artifact.status: pending — will be delivered by Guide instance 2

anomaly.implication: Stage 1.4 F4 must use the CLI wrapper pattern

anomaly.summary: Agents Cadence Monitor LogonType=S4U — Disable required Set-ScheduledTask workaround in non-elevated PowerShell
anomaly.implication: CRITICAL for Stage 4.7: Unregister/Register of this task requires elevated PowerShell. Pre-elevate the shell or split the operation per Stage 6.7.5 pattern. Follow-up Vikunja ticket recommended.

correction.summary: STATUS.md + baseline JSON corrected to state Vikunja stopped at Stage 0 close; capture-time vs stage-close distinction recorded
baseline JSON pause_commit_message corrected to verbatim git message; fleet_paused_reason_value added as separate field

deferred.note: STATUS.md Pre-execution invariant paragraph (~L13), HEAD d0dc1c7 reference (~L34), v2 banner HEAD 920c539 (~L11) — successor Guide will refresh at Stage 1 completion

pre_flight_checklist.step: Read 02_STAGE1_SCAFFOLD.xml when Guide instance 2 delivers it.
Verify branch=chore/platform-extraction, HEAD=a06f8a7, fleet_paused=true, 13/13 BlarAI scheduled tasks disabled.
Present comprehension-gate summary to LA. Do not begin work until approved.

do_not_list.item: Do NOT pause the fleet again — already paused with the correct reason.
Do NOT resume the fleet — pause is intentional for the entire platform-separation effort.
Do NOT pop stash@{0} — predates this work; belongs to LA's wake_launcher domain.
Do NOT touch docs/platform_separation/Temp for responses/ — LA scratch directory.
Do NOT delete the recovery anchors in §recovery_anchors.
Do NOT restart the Vikunja server outside of the Stage 1.4 F4 restart-then-stop window.
